user_query: I want to surprise my best friend with a unique gift by exploring luxury products from high-income countries, finding country lists, checking market movers, and recommending online shopping websites

TaskList.description: Query the list of countries with high income levels and identify relevant details for luxury products.
Query the list of all countries for possible gift sources.
Fetch current market movers, including top gainers and losers in the stock market.
Provide recommendations for online shopping websites that offer international shipping options.
